chat.author: Zaid AlBanna
chat.text: Does the term 'DNS provider' in the draft include registrars and registries?

chat.author: Paweł Kowalik
chat.text: they are in many cases but from the protocol perspective do not have to

chat.author: Zaid AlBanna
chat.text: Thanks. In that case could there be an overlap between RPP,EPP,RDAP and DCONN?

chat.author: Murray Kucherawy
chat.text: You may as well send them together.  async has a normative reference to the base.

chat.author: Murray Kucherawy
chat.text: ...meaning the base will be held anyway until async is approved.

chat.author: Paweł Kowalik
chat.text: I think the relation is only one way

chat.author: Paweł Kowalik
chat.text: at least from what I recall
